data.name: Stock from project to project:
data.notes: 1. Create a task 2. Include all details of the item 3. Should the client be credited at full cost 4. Confirm which project to allocate to 5. Confirm the cost to the client 6. Confirm if replacing the unit taken 7. Installation costs 8. Programming costs

data.name: Stock collected from Supplier:
data.notes: 1. Create a task 2. Attach supplier invoice and send to Mel with details. Alternatively send a pic on Asana.

data.name: When stock is required for installation
data.notes: 1. Create the task 2. Specify items & quantities clearly 3. Send in advance, the day before.

data.name: Stock back from site
data.notes: 1. Create a task 2. Attach a clear pic 3. Reason for return 4. Are we crediting the client? 5. Are we returning to supplier? 6. Are we refunding the client?

data.name: Stock orders:
data.notes: 1. Create a task 2. Provide clear instructions: item code/description/SKU, supplier, quantity 3. Confirm if client charged at cost/retail/no cost 4. Provide job card if relevant

data.name: Suppliers
Process Variations
data.notes: Invoice and credit as per variations

data.name: Call Outs
data.notes: Process of Call Out: Reference, Date of work, Installation time, Programming time, To be invoiced to client, Attach Job card, Special Instructions
